task: Allow callers of create_alert() to attach optional labels to an alert in alerting.py.
correctness_argument: Using `labels=None` as the sentinel avoids the mutable-default pitfall. `list(labels) if labels is not None else []` creates a fresh list on every call, so appending `default_label` never bleeds into a shared object. Callers that pass an explicit list are also protected from mutation.
